summary: A counter-attacking 4-2-3-1 built around Salah and Marmoush, with elite defensive efficiency — only 1 open-play goal conceded. Likely Salah's WC swansong.
style: 4-2-3-1 — counter-attacking & transition team, lots of goals after fewer than 3 passes, Salah & Marmoush as the difference-makers, mid-block set-up.

counterReliance.note: Counter & transition — goals after fewer than 3 passes

strengths: Tight defensive play — conceded only 1 open-play goal
Lethal in transition (goals after fewer than 3 passes)

keyPlayers.name: Mohamed Salah
keyPlayers.note: Record goalscorer — pace, power & creativity, capable of individual WC moments

tactics: Sit in a mid-block, defend tightly, and break fast through Salah and Marmoush. Probably Salah's WC swansong — they'll need to be at their absolute best.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
